packageRules.description: cargo: group minor/patch; majors stay individual
cargo: pre-1.0 crates treat 0.x→0.y as major (Cargo semver convention); ungroup from minor/patch so they land as individual PRs
dockerfile: group minor/patch; majors stay individual

Pinned git-rev cargo deps: inkwell/melior are forks tied to the LLVM 21.1 backend, slang_solidity is pinned for __private_backend_api compat, web3 (tomusdrw) is archived upstream. Disable Renovate's default git-digest updates — these are bumped manually when feature/build compat warrants. Note: matches on depName (Cargo.toml key), not packageName (which is the git URL for git-source deps).
solx-ci-runner is a private GHCR package
